title: Spicy Crumbly Indian Ginger Crumble
description: A quick-fix snack featuring allspice and tandoor spices in a sugar-free crumbly dish that's perfect for on-the-go consumption.
instructions: Combine allspice, tandoor powder, and ginger paste in a bowl.
Add coconut milk to the mixture until it reaches a smooth consistency.
Stir in saffron strands with enough warm water to cover them for about 10 minutes.
In another bowl, mix almond meal, rice flour, and ground cardamom together.
Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the wet while mixing continuously.
Spoon mixture onto a greased baking sheet or use muffin cups if desired. Chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve with tea or coffee as needed.
